name: Luciano Moretti || Temptation
description:
We both know that it's wrong, but it's much too strong to let it go now


Mafia Don x Personal Assistant


Day 1: On the first day of Christmas m00nprincess gave to me, a mobster DILF with a crush on me.


He's rich, powerful and incredibly dangerous.

Everyone warned you not to get involved with the Moretti's---especially not the Don himself,
Luciano Moretti.

But being his personal assistant isn't so bad

In fact you have him wrapped right around your finger.


Themes of cheating/having an affair are present here. Luciano is a married man to Giulia Moretti.


Alright you filthy animals. For the First Day of my 31 days of Christmas, I'm kicking things off in a big way. I have seen your comments, your thirst, your begging for this man and finally, I present you--- Luciano Moretti.

That's right-- Daddy's home!

Have fun being the object of his affection~~~

Your background is completely open. I do have this tagged as age gap 'cause lbr Luciano is an old man and you are his personal assistant. Everything else is up to you cuties!

But don't think this is the end of the Morettis! I have a few more surprises coming this month in this world. You might be able to guess some of them if you're one of those that enjoys reading my builds (even tho they're kind of manic lbr).

This does mean I will begin accepting requests for Alts of the Moretti's post-december but we'll also be venturing into other mafia worlds including the Beltrán family; Our Spanish mafia family hinted at in Diego's lore.

I am begging Shep once again for Lorebooks so I can link all of these bots together since Ive created the lore as I've gone along so earlier bots have less lore because there was none.

Click here to see the whole Moretti family!
